scenes.title: Spice Garden — Branded Homepage
scenes.narration: Welcome to Spice Garden — a fully branded restaurant experience powered by Sumaya Restro. Every restaurant gets its own stunning homepage with hero imagery, food gallery, live offers, and chef's specials. Guests can order online, book a table, or join the waitlist — all from one beautiful URL.

scenes.title: Customer Registration
scenes.narration: Customers register directly on the restaurant portal. Name, phone, email, and password — and they're instantly logged in with a CRM record created automatically. No app store required.

scenes.title: Customer Online Ordering
scenes.narration: The online ordering experience is rich and visual — menu items with photos, live bill preview with GST breakdown, and coupon support. Customers pick their table, add items to cart, and place the order. A Kitchen Order Ticket fires instantly to the kitchen display.

scenes.title: Table Reservation
scenes.narration: Table booking works without login — perfect for first-time guests. Pick a branch, choose date and time, enter guest details, and reserve instantly. Staff see the booking on their reservations board in real time.

scenes.title: Digital Waitlist
scenes.narration: When the restaurant is full, guests join the digital waitlist from their phone. No buzzers, no shouting names. Staff call the next guest and seat them with one click when a table opens.

scenes.title: Waiter Table Floor
scenes.narration: The waiter sees every table color-coded — green for available, red for occupied, amber for reserved. Tap any table to start taking an order. Live counts show available and occupied tables at a glance.

scenes.title: Waiter POS
scenes.narration: At the table, the waiter builds the order from the full menu with images and prices. Add items, adjust quantities, apply notes. One tap sends the order straight to the kitchen as a KOT ticket.

scenes.title: Kitchen Display System
scenes.narration: The Kitchen Display System is the operational heart. Every order appears as a KOT ticket with table number, items, and status. Kitchen staff advance tickets through Queued, Preparing, Ready, and Served — each change notifies waiters and customers automatically.

scenes.title: Cashier Billing & GST
scenes.narration: At billing, the cashier sees all unpaid orders. Apply coupon SPICE10 for an instant ten percent discount. The bill shows subtotal, discount, service charge, CGST and SGST separately, then the final total. Collect via cash, UPI, or card — and print a formatted GST receipt.

scenes.title: Reservations Management
scenes.narration: Staff manage today's reservations from one board — guest name, party size, time, and status. Check guests in when they arrive, or cancel no-shows. Every booking from the public page appears here instantly.

scenes.title: Staff Waitlist
scenes.narration: The waitlist board shows everyone waiting, sorted by arrival time. Call Next to notify the guest, then Seat Guest when a table is ready — replacing paper lists and shouting across the dining room.

scenes.title: Inventory Management
scenes.narration: Inventory tracks every ingredient — current stock, unit, reorder level, and supplier link. Low-stock items are flagged automatically, connecting directly to purchase orders and supplier management.

scenes.title: Suppliers & Procurement
scenes.narration: Suppliers are managed with full contact details and linked inventory items. Purchase orders, goods receipts, and stock ledger give complete procurement visibility from order to shelf.

scenes.title: Owner Dashboard & AI Insights
scenes.narration: The owner dashboard shows today's revenue, order count, active tables, and pending kitchen tickets. AI demand forecasting predicts top sellers for the week. Compare branches, manage staff, configure coupons, and control the branded landing page — all from one command center.

scenes.title: Mobile App — Waiter
scenes.narration: Sumaya Restro includes a native mobile app for every role. Waiters carry the table floor in their pocket — see availability, take orders at the table, and mark tables free when guests leave. Real-time sync with the web POS and kitchen.

scenes.title: Mobile App — Kitchen
scenes.narration: Kitchen staff use the mobile KDS on tablets or phones. Every ticket shows order number, table, and items. Tap Advance to move through the workflow — the same tickets visible on the big kitchen display.

scenes.title: Mobile App — Customer
scenes.narration: Customers order from the mobile app too — browse the menu, add to cart, and track their order live with a status timeline from confirmed to served. Registration takes seconds, no app store friction with Expo.

scenes.title: Closing
scenes.narration: That is Spice Garden on Sumaya Restro — end to end restaurant management. Branded customer experience, waiter POS, kitchen KDS, GST billing with coupons, inventory, suppliers, owner analytics, and mobile apps for every role. Two branches, one platform, zero compromise. Thank you for watching.
